creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
This release contains several new features, improvements and bugfixes.

Full changelog: https://dnsdist.org/changelog.html

Buildlog: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/latest-per-pkg/dnsdist/1.3.3/freebsd_11x64-system.log

While here also fix building against Lua(JIT). The configuration switch changed since 1.3.2. When building without poudriere, it would always pick LuaJIT over Lua if both are installed, basically ignoring the configuration knob.

Delete files: files/patch-boost-1.69
